ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Off Calendar Jul-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Andrew J. Nissen of the law offices of Mathews Nissen LLP (949.442.4840) appears via telephone as moving party counsel for plaintiff

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF MARGARET FRODEL's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, that is effective upon proof of service, that includes client's contact information and that includes all future court dates.
